title: About
text: This website is a simple portfolio for sharing my academic background, project work, and professional materials.

title: About
text:
What this site includes

A homepage with a quick overview of who I am and what I am working on.
A projects section for coursework, portfolio pieces, and technical work.
A resume page with a downloadable PDF.
A posts section for future writing and reflections.

title: About
text:
Current focus
I am especially interested in using data to support clear decision-making, practical business insight, and concise communication.

title: Ben Kleiman
text:
I am Ben Kleiman, a UC San Diego MSBA student with experience in college baseball, analytics, MLB front office work, and business analytics.
This site is where I share my background, selected work, and the ideas I am exploring as I continue to grow in data and business analytics.
